"expand":{"book_id":"7160453629403466752","book_info":{"abstract":"叶楚意外穿越特种兵的世界，成为跟何大队同一期的兵，而且是何大队的班长。
当何大队在叶楚帮助下创立狼牙，之后叶楚却整整消失了十多年，直到他再一次出现，竟然是在铁拳团，而且只是一个养殖班的班长。
何晨光：“叶班长，你在铁拳团是我班长，怎么我去了狼牙，你还阴魂不散？”
庄炎：“班长，我错了，求求你教我，我真不知道你竟然是狼牙？”
火凤凰全体跟龙小云：”呸，这叶教官肯定是单身狗，一点不知道怜香惜玉，老娘一定要让他爱上我，到时候给他生十个八个小狼牙？”
范天坑：”班长，我错了，我不想当卧底，大队长，你给我求个情？”
温大坑：“天雷，别求情了，跟我一起吧，我也是你的老班长，我照着你的。”
为何而战的意志，胜于钢铁之躯！
那有什么岁月静好，只是有人替你负重前行！
终于有一天，当叶楚进入身份被真实身份被曝光之时，所有军官将士：“全体立正，给大佬敬礼！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/38b86dcde42e0695da44c4584443fd60","author":"冷雨夜的剑","author_id":"","book_id":"7160453629403466752","book_name":"范天雷，你没想到我竟然是狼牙吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9749人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7160533416918647333","read_count":"9749","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"679755"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"277","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,特种兵,大佬,打脸,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4d853221a182f96f9a2a491fe17a04ae~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178473&x-signature=Q4%2Bp8T5GzCMgXqI1FvEgf%2BfX1e0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"69654922894","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novel
